vehicle.label: Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair
vehicle.desc: Wearable force-feedback exo-glove pair for VR grasp resistance, serviceable actuator cartridges, linkages, wrist band, and dorsal control module

parts.label: Dorsal Control Module x 2
parts.spec: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits

parts.spec: Knuckle-crossing wiring loom with service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, flex-rated bend radius, power vs signal channel separation

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues if heat sink is not properly aligned with controller board.
risk.mit: Ensure heat sink alignment and thermal paste application during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of signal interference if power and signal lines are not adequately separated.
risk.mit: Verify power and signal lines are routed separately and shielded if necessary.

risk.mit: Conduct snap fit strength tests and ensure design meets required retention force.

risk.desc: Service access may be restricted if cable exits and service ports are not correctly placed.
risk.mit: Ensure cable exits and service ports are placed for easy access during service.

risk.desc: Standoff assembly may fail if not properly preloaded or locked.
risk.mit: Include visible locking evidence and torque/preload intent for standoff assembly.

risk.desc: Cable routing may be exposed to mechanical stress due to lack of strain relief.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features to cable exits and ensure routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Connector accessibility may be compromised if connectors face closed walls.
risk.mit: Ensure connectors are reachable without disassembling structure and have finger/tool clearance.

risk.desc: Finger cartridge serviceability may be hindered if linkages are not easily removable.
risk.mit: Design finger linkages to be removable by single pin or visible hinge access.

risk.desc: Actuator module access may be obstructed if not visible near knuckle row.
risk.mit: Ensure actuator modules remain visible near knuckle row with connector/service geometry.

risk.desc: Wearable comfort may be compromised if rigid mock assembly ignores soft-contact cues.
risk.mit: Preserve soft-contact cues, wrist quick release, and ergonomic clearance in rigid mock assembly.
